---
title: "\'Nous avons change tout cela, 1850-1890\' by the Editor"
---

## \'Nous avons change tout cela, 1850-1890\' by the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1891
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (January 1891) 25-30

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
